hero.title: Join the Civil Society Movement
hero.description: INFID is a collaborative forum for civil society organizations fighting for inclusive, democratic, and just development in Indonesia.

requirement.title: Member Requirements
requirement.description: INFID is a collaborative forum for civil society organizations fighting for inclusive, democratic, and just development in Indonesia.

recommendation.title: Recommendation
recommendation.description: Obtain recommendations from 2 (two) INFID member institutions located in the Java region/island

legality.title: Legality
legality.description: Accept INFID's Statutes, particularly the obligations of INFID members as stated in Chapter VI on Membership and INFID's Bylaws in Chapter II on Membership

footer_section.title: Ready to Join Us?
footer_section.description: Click the button below to start the registration process or learn more about the flow.

header.title: INFID Member Admission Process
header.description: The admission process is conducted transparently and in stages through official organizational mechanisms.

help_box.title: Need Help?
help_box.description: Contact our secretariat for further guidance.

01.title: Selection Result Decision
01.description: The decision on whether or not a prospective member is accepted will be issued through the Board of Directors Meeting. The Board's decision is published as a Decree regarding the Prospective Member's Application.

02.title: Decree Delivery
02.description: The INFID Secretariat will promptly deliver the Decree regarding the Prospective Member's Application to the relevant parties.

03.title: New Member Legalization
03.description: Prospective Members declared accepted will be designated and legalized in the General Assembly as INFID Members.

04.title: Information & Contact
04.description: To obtain further information regarding INFID membership requirements and registration processes, please contact the INFID Secretariat via email at office@infid.org.
